headline: Fine Art Collector Program continues, 2X Acid/Fooligan/Special Vehicle/Community, 4X FIB Priority File
quickTake: Log in for GTA$500,000 and claim a free Benefactor Turreted Limo from Warstock Cache & Carry

4X GTA$ on FIB Priority File and 2X GTA$ on FIB Files

beginnerPath.label: Log in first: this week gives you GTA$500,000 and a free Turreted Limo.
If you own an Acid Lab, prioritize Acid Product Missions for 2X GTA$ and RP.
If you have access to FIB Files, complete 3 for the GTA$100,000 weekly challenge and run Priority File for 4X GTA$.
Join a Heist if you can: any Heist completion unlocks GTA$1,000,000 and the NOOSE Outfit.
